rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a careful copy-edit, improving clarity and precision by removing hedging and adding specific details where possible.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly marked uncertainties with placeholders and provided clear notes on missing information, ensuring transparency.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope, addressing all main issues without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced; the text identifies areas needing improvement.
rationale.RX.5: While some traceability is present through placeholders, major changes aren't annotated with sources.
